pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **Look, I get why people say Gunner is leading, but let's credit France for that rather than Bubba G's draft intellect.** I mean, the guy's name is synonymous with chaos in the drafting community, and yet here he is, surfing on the coattails of Les Bleus. While Devin—bless his heart—finds himself second, you have to wonder about the conversation he was having when he picked Haiti in the fourth round. Sure, Gayden's English squad is doing fine after dispatching Panama, but you'd think The Backpass Assassin would have a grander strategy than relying on last-minute miracles. And then we have Zach, Mustard Boy, who loves an underdog story that rarely comes to fruition, as evidenced by Ghana's recent loss. I feel for Rafe, The Noisemaker; despite his last-place position, he does mean well. You have to admire his pure chaos strategy, drafting teams like Uzbekistan. Some might call it a misguided venture, but you know, sometimes life's simple mysteries are the most fun to watch unravel. Looking ahead, I fully expect Bubba G's DR Congo to keep their surprising form going, while all eyes will be on Mustard Boy's Brazil to pull something out of the hat they were never actually in.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Brazil Strategy Backfires as Austria Draws with Algeria
pundit_takes.subtitle: A draw netted one point, matching Austria's ambition under Zach.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's England Victory Overshadowed by Jordan's Consistent Underperformance
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Scoring three against my team wasn't part of the plan," quipped Gayden.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Second Place Journey Continues as Spain Faces Swedish Showdown
pundit_takes.subtitle: Holding second just chill, unless Spain decides to spice it up.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Maintains Top Spot Thanks to DR Congo's Unexpected Heroics
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Our secret weapon: a Tier 4 masterclass," revealed Bubba G.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's sitting pretty with France's perfect 3-0 record and a 30% win chance.
Rafe, your Tier-1 Germany is getting schooled by Ecuador. Nice draft strategy, rookie.
Rafe vs. Gayden is dead even at 0. Thanksgiving will be awkward, pops.
Sim accuracy? More like a joke—Rafe still grinning with a 12% win probability.
